steps: Go to https://app.pendo.io and log in with your Pendo account (Admin permissions required)
Click on Settings (gear icon) in the top-right corner
Enter a descriptive name for the key
Optionally enable 'Allow Write Access' if the key needs to push data to Pendo
Click 'Create' and copy the integration key immediately
notes: Admin permissions are required to create integration keys
Integration keys are not tied to a specific user — they provide access to all apps in your Pendo subscription
By default, keys are read-only; enable 'Allow Write Access' to send events and update metadata
Use the header: x-pendo-integration-key: <your_key> for all requests
Pendo is an enterprise product — contact sales for pricing; no self-serve free tier

test_endpoint.description: List all tracked pages with view counts
